title: Coordinates in the location column differ from Google Maps
excerpt:

posts.author: IzzyLu (Isabell Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When copying the coordinates from Google Maps to the location column in monday, the shown location on the map in monday is only precise if there is an address / street nearby. monday can’t show coorindates precisely if they are in the middle of a field. Instead it seems to look for the nearest street/ address and shows the pin needle there on the map.
For our projects, that are built on fields, it is necessary for monday to show the coordinates where they really are.

What are you trying to achieve

Please show the pin on the map in the location column at the correct coordinates.
